name: Curried Chicken and Bow Tie Pasta Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Poach chicken in a large pot with enough cold water to barely cover, adding peppercorns, bay leaf, parsley, thyme, and one each onion, carrot, and celery cut into quarters. Bring to a boil with lid on, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 50 minutes. Cool in poaching liquid, drain, skin, and shred the chicken.
2. To make curry flavoring, soften diced onion in hot oil over medium-high heat for about 3 minutes. Add curry powder and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute. Pour in white wine and water, then boil rapidly until reduced to about 3 tablespoons. Strain and let cool.
3. Prepare the curry mayonnaise by combining all ingredients with a smooth consistency.
4. In a large bowl, combine shredded chicken, cooked bow tie pasta, salt, pepper, and curry mayonnaise. Mix gently until well coated. If needed, add warm water gradually to achieve a smooth texture.
5. Just before serving, place a portion of salad on a bed of spinach and sprinkle reserved peppers on top. Serve immediately.
